item.title: Advanced Helm Charts: Hooks, Tests & Dependencies Guide
item.description: Learn to build production-grade Helm charts with hooks for atomic database migrations, test suites for pre-traffic validation, and dependency management for complex microservices. This guide bridges the gap between basic Helm usage and reliable Kubernetes deployment orchestration.

item.title: Event-Driven Architecture in Pimcore with Symfony Messenger
item.description: Learn to decouple Pimcore operations using Symfony Messenger for async workflows. Covers multi-transport setup, custom event subscribers, and resilience patterns for massive data operations.

item.title: About
item.description:
cron.umbe.me

Technical blog on DevOps/Cloud, Backend/API, Pimcore, Symfony, Laravel and REST API — published automatically three times a week in Italian and English.

How it works

The pipeline runs every Monday, Wednesday and Thursday at 9:00 UTC via GitHub Actions.

Monday and Wednesday — Trend Stream

🔍 TrendAgent → reads HackerNews, DEV.to and GitHub Trending
🎯 TopicAgent → picks the most relevant topic (DevOps, Backend)

Thursday — PHP Stream

🎯 TopicAgent → rotates across Pimcore, Symfony, Laravel, REST/API

Both streams then:
